rationale: Both correctly identify the root cause (PR #4527's None inter-stage payload starving the downstream stage) and the fix (PR #4792, already in the 0.24 rebase commit a560ed18), matching the ground truth's own code quote almost verbatim. X is more grounded, citing the gpu_ar_model_runner.py precedent the ground-truth comment itself references ('See gpu_ar_model_runner'), and is more complete, addressing the reporter's exact environment details and pre-empting red herrings with concrete upgrade/cherry-pick/workaround options. Y's answer is redundant (duplicates the draft_answer content in the report body) and leaves in internal scaffolding ('task: {...}') that a maintainer wouldn't post, slightly hurting completeness/polish despite reaching the same correct disposition.
